label: 洪泛生长
description: 从一组种子点出发，在区域约束内做随机 frontier 洪泛生长，长成一组有机斑块（organic blob）。对每个种子点，从生长前沿随机取格、4-邻接扩张、达到目标格数截停，得到不规则的湖泊状形态；后长的斑块自动避开已长的（互不重叠）。size 控制每个斑块的目标格数，sizeVariance 给目标格数加 ± 抖动。每个斑块输出一张独立的 0/1 网格，顺序=生长顺序。
description-en: Grows a set of organic blobs by randomized frontier flood-fill from seed points within a region constraint. For each seed, cells are pulled randomly from the growth frontier and expanded over 4-connected neighbors until the target cell count is reached, producing irregular lake-like shapes; later blobs avoid earlier ones (non-overlapping). size sets each blob's target cell count, sizeVariance adds ± jitter. Each blob is emitted as its own 0/1 grid, ordered by growth order.
icon: 深色背景上几个不规则的有机斑块从中心点向外蔓延生长，形态像水洼或墨迹扩散，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 约束区域
inputs.description: 0/1（或多值）约束区网格；斑块只能长在非零有效格内。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 (or multi-valued) constraint region grid; blobs grow only on non-zero valid cells.

inputs.name: points
inputs.label: 种子点掩码
inputs.description: 种子点掩码网格，非零格各视为一个生长种子点（通常来自 alg_points_scatter 的 points 输出）。
inputs.description-en: Seed point mask grid; each non-zero cell is a growth seed (typically the points output of alg_points_scatter).

inputs.name: size
inputs.label: 斑块大小
inputs.description: 每个斑块的目标格数（生长到该格数即停）。
inputs.description-en: Target cell count for each blob (growth stops at this size).

inputs.name: sizeVariance
inputs.label: 大小抖动
inputs.description: 目标格数的 ± 随机抖动比例（0..1）。0=所有斑块同样大；0.3=每个斑块在 ±30% 范围内随机。
inputs.description-en: Random ± jitter ratio for the target size (0..1). 0 = uniform size; 0.3 = each blob randomized within ±30%.

inputs.name: spacingDilate
inputs.label: 间距禁区
inputs.description: 斑块间最小间隔圈数。0=斑块只互不重叠（与旧版完全一致）；>0=每个斑块长完后，对其占用格做该步数的 4-邻接 BFS 膨胀并并入禁区，后续斑块不能在膨胀区内生长，从而保证斑块之间至少隔这么多圈空格。膨胀格只作禁区，不计入斑块输出。复刻自老电池 lake_gen 的 minSpacing。
inputs.description-en: Minimum ring gap between blobs. 0 = blobs only avoid overlap (identical to old behavior); >0 = after each blob is grown, its cells are dilated by this many 4-connected BFS steps and merged into the forbidden zone so later blobs cannot grow within it, keeping at least this many empty rings between blobs. Dilated cells are forbidden-zone only and are not part of any blob output. Replicates the minSpacing of the legacy lake_gen battery.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间。

outputs.name: partition
outputs.label: 斑块列表
outputs.description: 每个长成的斑块输出一张独立的 0/1 网格；列表按生长（种子）顺序排列。
outputs.description-en: One 0/1 grid per grown blob; list ordered by growth (seed) order.
